summary: Iteration 55: Verified INTEL Dashboard exact positions feature. All 14 backend tests passed. Dashboard returns exact positions (CB, LB, LW, GK for soccer; G, SF, Forward for basketball) instead of generic ones. Backfill endpoint works correctly. Picks save stores position and role fields. Worst misses include role information. Owner-only access control verified.

minor.issue: Some older picks still show generic positions (DEF, MID) - 4 out of 15 soccer picks. These may need manual backfill or were created before position data was available.

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test pick TEST_POS_* for position/role storage verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 verified INTEL exact positions feature: (1) GET /api/intel/dashboard returns exact positions in byPosition - soccer: GK, CB, LB, LW found; basketball: G, SF, Forward, Guard found, (2) POST /api/intel/backfill-positions works and is idempotent (0 picks needed update - most already backfilled), (3) POST /api/picks/save correctly stores position and role from player data, (4) Worst misses include role field (e.g., 'Sweeper Keeper', 'Shot-Stopper'), (5) Owner-only access control works - non-owner (xaviersteverson@gmail.com) correctly denied, (6) Position+Prop breakdown shows exact positions with stats. Note: 4 older soccer picks still show generic positions (DEF, MID) - these may be from before position data was available in predictions.
